items.headline: Albemarle Appoints Former Vale CEO Eduardo Bartolomeo as Outside Director
items.snippet: Former Vale CEO Eduardo Bartolomeo Appointed as Outside Director. Expert with over 30 years of experience in mining, logistics, and metals. Objective: Strengthen strategy for lithium production expansion and supply chain optimization.

items.headline: Will ALB's Expansion Actions Power Stronger Sales Volumes?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation ALB is strategically executing its projects aimed at boosting its global lithium conversion capacity. ALB saw higher sales volumes (up 14% year over year) in its Energy Storage unit in the first quarter on the strength of its integrated conversion facilities

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?

items.headline: Albemarle and Cars.com have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Shares of Albemarle (NYSE: ALB) are flat so far this year, thanks to an oversupply of lithium and a flattened demand for electric vehicles (EVs) in the United States. However, the long-term need for this critical metal is projected to increase 353% by the end of the decade, accor

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, also noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing, contrasting with the irregularity of demand from electric vehicles.
